w:r.w:t: This document contains the complete UI/UX specification for all 9 roles in the Jamisan ERP. It is the build-ready reference for Claude Code during Modules 4 through 7. Every screen, every interaction, every data rule is defined here.

⚠ The design system is set by the CSR module (Section 1). All other roles inherit the sidebar, colour palette, grid pattern, tab pattern, and slide-out panel pattern from the CSR module. Do not deviate.
Airtable-style grid. Wireframes built in Adobe Fireworks and Photoshop by Director. Purple annotations = instructions only, not part of design.
Rich black background. Red circular toggle (chevron left = expanded, chevron right = collapsed). Muted orange inactive items. White active item. Fixed bottom bar — avatar, name, logout.
Background: rich black (#0D0D0D). Primary: Jamisan Orange (#F59E0B). Active/accent: white. Inactive: muted orange/grey. Danger: red. Focus mode: blue pill.
Airtable-inspired. Frozen headers. Funnel filter per column. Inline editing. Horizontal and vertical scroll. Traffic light row colour coding.
Slide-out from right. 75% screen width. Top action bar fixed. Left form scrollable. Right intelligence panel collapsible.
CSR, Ops Manager, Director, Accountant, HR, Warehouse Coordinator, Auditor, Social Media Manager, Data Analyst
All 9 roles complete. Wireframe-locked. Schema audited — 17 issues fixed. 5 Gemini stress test flaws resolved.
Primary interface. Used 8+ hours daily. Every other module inherits from this design. Goal: process orders as fast as possible with as few clicks as possible.
Full black background. Centered dark card. Jamisan logo with orange A mark at top.
Email address or username. Password with lock icon.
Opens modal: 'Kindly reach out to the operations manager.' Orange header, X close.
HR or Director creates all accounts. No self-registration.
Workspace (default), Reports, Inventory, 🧠 Lessons Learned, Complaints, Settings (bottom)
Chevron LEFT inside red circle. Icons + text labels. White active, muted orange inactive.
Chevron RIGHT inside red circle. Icons only. Maximises grid space.
Fixed. Avatar (photo or initial), First Name + Last Initial (e.g. Faith A.), Logout icon right.
Bottom left. Coffee cup icon ☕. Click turns bottom bar amber and sets status to Away immediately. Click again to resume.
Primary master grid. Default on login.
Dedicated workspace for Scheduled and Committed Scheduled orders only.
Internal agent directory — hub addresses, phone numbers, WhatsApp group links.
CSR personal metrics and team leaderboard.
Thick orange underline beneath active item.
All orders newest to oldest. No time restriction.
Interested status orders. Excludes last 24 hours. Shows 25 hours to 1 week ago only.
Blank Comments field. Now to 1 week ago.
Pending status. Now to 1 week ago.
Cash Paid with logistics_fee = 0 or null. Up to 3 months ago.
Cash Paid with date_paid empty. No time limit.
Abandoned status. Now to 1 week ago.
Not Picking Calls, Unreachable, Call Back. Now to 72 hours ago.
Any Pending order at exactly 72 hours switches to Abandoned via cron job. No human input.
Active = white background. Inactive = muted orange. Red circular badge with count when above zero.
Popup explaining traffic light colour coding.
Focus mode. Blue pill with white X when active. Open eye icon. Filters to logged-in CSR orders only.
Airtable multi-condition panel: Where/And/Or + field + operator + value. Add condition, Add condition group, Copy from another view.
Rapid filter — show only Green, Red, or Orange rows.
Expandable text field for phone number or Order ID.
REMOVED — column funnel + master filter + Color covers all needs.
Top right. Jamisan Gold button. Opens Workflow B slide-out.
Sticky — remain visible during vertical scroll.
Funnel icon [▽] on every column for instant column-level filtering.
Default 150 rows. Adjustable to 1000. First/prev/numbers/next/last navigation.
Primary key. Locked. Click opens slide-out.
Locked for CSRs. Editable by Ops Manager/Director only.
Days From Order. Locked. Computed: today minus creation date.
Name, Phone (clickable — WhatsApp desktop / call mobile), Product, Colour, Price, State, LGA, Agent, Status, Comments (30-char preview), Date Paid, Sex — all editable inline.
Phone/email matches a previous Banned order. Row turns deep red. Status forced to Banned automatically.
Phone/email matches a previous order but none are Cash Paid.
Phone/email matches a previous Cash Paid order. Bright green row, white text.
No match found. Brand new customer.
Click Order ID or New button. Covers 75% of screen from right.
Up/Down navigation chevrons, Save button, Copy Order, Editing Mode status, collapse/expand right panel, X close.
Read-only header: Order #10000 for Ohambele (FJAMG1271) — DFO (3 Days). Sub: Order ID — Customer Name (time | date).
Existing order. Call-flow order: Phone, Other Number, Status, Comments, Agent + strategy link icon, Date Paid, Price, State, LGA, City, Address, Product, Qty, Order Bump, Logistics Fee, Sex, Email.
Phone first (auto-fills from DB lookup), Other Number, Name, Product, Qty, Price, Order Bump, State, LGA, City, Address, Agent + strategy link, Logistics Fee, Status, Comments, Sex, Email, Date Paid.
Chain link icon beside Agent dropdown. Opens state distribution strategy file in new tab.
Intercepts save. Forces date_paid and logistics_fee before proceeding.
Intercepts save. Forces failure_reason_id and mandatory comment.
Dropdown. Selecting a product reveals Bump Qty and editable Bump Price. Reverting collapses fields.
Total Orders (lifetime), Cash Paid Orders, Delivery Success Rate %, Total Lifetime Value ₦.
Dynamic coloured pills e.g. 🟢 Verified Buyer.
Scrollable timeline of previous order cards — product and CSR comments per order.
Read-only: Assigned Weekday, System Log Time, Last Modified Timestamp, API Batch ID. Developer verification only.
< icon collapses right panel. > icon expands. Gives full-width left form when needed.
Top 3 podium. Ranked grid: Rank, Name, Conversion Rate. Department average benchmark line. Commission amounts hidden.
Personal stats: Total Orders, Sales, Conversion Rate, Estimated Commission. The Hitlist — unresponsive leads for final follow-up.
Date range (defaults to last Friday–Thursday). Any Other Business text area. Generate My Report button downloads Section 3 PDF.
Searchable by category and keyword. Submit a Lesson form (status = Pending, awaits Director review).
CSR clicks On Break toggle. Immediate.
Logged out or no action for 45+ minutes.
Pabbly assigns as normal. Ops Manager bulk reassigns Away CSR leads manually.
Exception-based management. System flags what is broken — Ops Manager acts. Never searching, always triaging.
Command Center (default), Master Orders, Agent Remittances, Staff Roster, Audit and Exceptions, Vendors
F-shape reading pattern. Critical Alerts at top. Triage below.
Floating Cash (₦ total), Stale Deliveries (orders >96hrs no update), CSR Idle Alerts (offline CSRs during shift).
Left panel. Agent name, unremitted ₦, oldest debt days. Click agent → Agent Remittances filtered to that agent. Click View Full Agent Ledger → full module.
Right panel. CSR Name, Status (🟢/🟡/🔴), Leads Handled, Conversion Rate, Away timestamp. Reassign Leads button.
CSR Request Unban escalations. Ops Manager reads explanation and clicks Unban User.
Cash Paid with ₦0 logistics fee. Ops Manager reads comment and clicks Approve.
General escalation with reason code: Fraud Suspected, Agent Refusing Pickup, Wrong Item Shipped, etc.
Every escalation requires action — cannot be left open.
Same 17-column grid as CSR + Override Status column.
Editable dropdown for Ops Manager and Directors.
Force Status, Unban User, Approve Zero Fee buttons — role-restricted.
Select multiple rows → change CSR in bulk. Used when CSR goes Away with unworked leads.
All, Escalations (badge), Banned Overrides (badge), Zero-Fee Approvals (badge).
Editable dropdown. Ops Manager can reassign any order.
Additional Audit Trail tab alongside Customer History. Shows: timestamp, field changed, old value, new value, user.
Clear Debt → creates agent_remittance row with status = Pending_Bank_Verification. Removes dashboard alert.
Matches against bank statement → Verified and Cleared (separate step).
Red = 7+ days, Yellow = 3–6 days, Green = 0–2 days, Grey = Settled.
Live performance and capacity matrix. Read-only grid.
Name + Status, Shift Start, Fresh Leads Assigned, Leads Touched, Conversion Rate, Hygiene Counts, Last Activity timestamp.
All 10 sections preview. Any Other Business text area. Generate button activates only after Accountant Notes is filled.
Jamisan-branded. Accountability columns flagged red if above zero.
— The Executive Suite — Replaces Power BI
Full company view always. Two Directors — neither sees personalised data. Dashboard replaces Power BI entirely.
Date Range (Today/Week/Month/Q1/YTD/Custom), Department (All/Beauty/Gadgets), State (All + individual), Agent (All + individual).
Server re-fetches all charts on filter change. One clean reload.
Click a chart bar to filter all other charts. Deferred — too risky for V1.
SUM across ad_expenses + procurement_expenses + waybill_expenses + expenses + logistics fees.
Gross Revenue minus Total Expenses. Green = positive, Red = negative.
Four sub-cards: Ads, Procurement, Shipping, Logistics.
Total Expenses ÷ Total Orders. Computed at query time.
Total Expenses ÷ Cash Paid Orders. Computed at query time.
Net P/L line chart (monthly trend), Total Sales vs Expenses combo chart (monthly), Expense breakdown donut (all 27 categories).
Tab A — Sales Funnel and Demographics
Waterfall funnel. Conversion by Sex (Male/Female/Undefined — all three). Conversion by Day of Week bar chart.
CSR Leaderboard combo (orders bar + conversion rate line). Agent Delivery Rate combo.
Orders + Conversion by State. Product Winners combo. Revenue per product per month table. Order Source breakdown.
Pending submissions. Review slide-out: Publish as Official or Reject with mandatory reason.
Beauty/Gadgets selector. Base Rate %, Target Rate %, Planned Sales Rate %. Effective From date. Current vs previous shown.
HR and Directors can create, disable, and manage accounts.
Daily discrepancies between CRM and Pabbly order counts.
Exports exactly what is on screen — current filter state, hero numbers, funnel, charts. Jamisan-branded.
Sanitised rows used to generate current charts. Accountant can use in QuickBooks or Xero.
Task-first design. Lands on Pending Actions. Clear the queue, close the day. Ledger-style density throughout.
Pending Actions (default), Core Financials, Remittance Clearing, Marketing and Ads, Procurement and Waybills, Payroll and Admin
Read-only. Can view all orders. Cannot edit any field.
Staff whose payroll is calculated but payment_date is null.
Reminder to log weekly ad spend if not yet entered.
Reminder to enter Providus and Moniepoint inflows/outflows.
Log Date, Agent, ₦ Expected, Logged By (Ops Mgr), Bank Ref/Notes, Verify Match button.
Slide-out asks for actual deposited amount. System auto-calculates variance.
Select reason (Agent Shortage, Bank Charges, Partial Payment, Transfer Error, Overpayment). Confirm Clearance.
Actual amount → Gross Revenue. Shortage stays as agent_ledger debit — NOT forgiven automatically. Director must explicitly forgive via Manual_Adjustment.
Shortage triggers alert to Ops Manager and Director with full breakdown.
🟢 Fully Reconciled, 🟡 Reconciled with Shortage, 🔵 Reconciled with Overpayment.
Date, Platform, Campaign Name, Product, Amount, Payment Method, Receipt URL (Google Drive link).
Saving an ad expense immediately updates Director CPO and CPS calculations.
Vendor dropdown (from vendors table), USD + NGN, exchange rate, receipt URL.
Accountant or Ops Manager — both have access.
Payment method: Company Paid, Agent to Pay and Deduct, Petty Cash.
Auto-posts Waybill_Paid_By_Agent credit to agent_ledger immediately.
Director reviews and clicks Approve Batch.
Accountant pays externally via bank transfer.
Accountant logs payment_date, bank_reference, payment_method in CRM — status = Paid.
Base salary from csr_levels. Commission from csr_performance_monthly. Bonuses from weekly_bonus_log.
Google Drive link. Accountant uploads to Drive, copies shareable link, pastes into receipt_url.
Staff Directory (default), Digital Punch-Clock, Payroll Runs, Audit Logs
Status (🟢/🔴/⚫), Name, Username, Role, Department, Last Login, Edit button.
is_active = false → session invalidated instantly → audit_log stamped.
Auto-generated: firstname.lastinitial (e.g. jane.d). Cannot be manually overridden.
Auto-generated and emailed to employee. HR never sees it.
Auto-set to L1 on creation. Fully automated promotion — HR cannot change manually.
NIN, Medical Conditions, Main Account Number, Alternate Account Number. Encrypted at rest — database admin cannot read raw values.
Full Name, DOB, Gender, Phone, Email, Address, Employment details, Next of Kin, Emergency Contact, Driver's License, Tax ID, Bank details.
Completely invisible to employees. HR, Directors, Ops Manager only.
Name + Status, First Login, Last Logout, Total Session, Idle Time ⚠️, Leads Assigned, Leads Touched, Conversion Rate, Hygiene Counts, Audit Actions, Last Activity.
last_active_at updated on every API request. Gap = now() minus last_active_at.
Name + Level, Base Salary, Paid Units, Conversion %, Commission Tier, Total Commission, Weekly Bonuses, Total Pay.
Fully automated via csr_promotion_thresholds. HR cannot override.
Click any commission cell → raw csr_performance_monthly data shown. Exportable as PDF.
HR prepares → Director approves → Accountant pays externally → Accountant logs reference.
Live Inventory (default), Goods Movement, Waybills, Returned and Trashed, Stock Adjustments
Main Stock and Order Bump Stock — identical layout, separate tables.
Product, Variant, Waybill Stock, Reserved (Pending), Decremented (Cash Paid), Available to Sell (generated).
🟢 Healthy, 🟡 Below 20% waybill stock, 🔴 10 or fewer units.
Product, Variant, Qty, Movement Type, Destination Agent, State. Transfers physical liability to agent.
Auto-notifies Accountant to log transport cost in Finance module.
Company Paid, Agent to Pay and Deduct, Petty Cash.
Inserts into trashed_items → trigger subtracts from waybill_stock. Prevents ghost stock.
Good condition returns re-enter stock. No deduction.
If adjustment pushes available below zero → blocked → Pending Director Approval.
130+ Initial_Count_Correction migration entries visible as archived records.
Most critical rule: absolute read-only enforced at RBAC level — not just UI. The Auditor cannot change a single status, delete a comment, or edit a price.
Audit Dashboard (default), Global Activity Log, Communication Forensics, Spot-Check Queues
Orders with 4+ status changes within the same calendar day.
Cash Paid with ₦0 logistics fee not approved by Ops Manager.
Pending to terminal status in under 3 minutes. Triage table: Order ID, CSR, Time Assigned, Time Failed, Delta, Failure Reason.
Auditor's only write action. Mandatory note. Routes via order_escalations with Auditor_Flag reason code. Director sees in Approvals panel.
Timestamp, User + Role, Action, Record ID, Field Changed, Old Value, New Value.
Field Changed = Price instantly surfaces all price modifications — primary fraud detection.
No row in audit_log can be edited or deleted by any user. PostgreSQL-level constraint.
Every export to Cash Paid and Complaints sheets. Success/failure status.
Daily CRM vs Pabbly order count discrepancies.
Live read-only WhatsApp chat log via WATI API. Deferred to V2.
50 random orders targeting Cash Paid, Failed, Cancelled, CSR Skipped, recent stock adjustments.
Pass ✅, Flag ❌ (routes to Director), Add Note 📝.
Dashboard-only, read-only. No order grids. No individual rows. Zero PII. Enforced at RBAC level.
Date Range, Department (Beauty/Gadgets/All), Source (Facebook/TikTok/Jamisan Form/All — from order_sources table).
Raw Leads → Validated → Abandoned/Rejected → Cash Paid → Final Conversion Rate.
Male, Female, Undefined — all three always shown.
Horizontal bar chart. Tells SMM optimal days to publish.
State, Raw Leads, Cash Paid, Conversion Rate, Recommendation.
Below 15% — add to Facebook/TikTok exclusion list.
Recommendations based on department_targets thresholds — not static labels.
Rank, Product, Total Leads, Cash Paid, Conversion Rate, Trend vs previous period.
Steep downward trend on same creative = refresh needed.
Can ask infinite multi-variable questions without writing SQL. Read-only across entire database. Aggregated CSV export only — no raw PII rows.
Deep Query Engine (default), Lead Decay and Cohorts, Fulfillment Forensics.
Director P&L, SMM Insights, Ops Command Center, HR Punch-Clock.
Same Airtable multi-condition filter as CSR — Match ALL/ANY, Where/And/Or, field + operator + value. No new UI infrastructure needed.
Department, Product, State, LGA, Agent, CSR, Status, DFO, Date Range, Sex, Price, Source, Order Bump, Failure Reason.
Aggregated view: total records, total value at risk, average DFO. Paginated read-only grid.
Agent, CSR, State, Product, or Status.
Shared across team — not personal only.
Aggregated CSV — not raw individual rows with PII.
DFO vs Conversion Rate. Drop-off velocity per day. Day 3+ flagged ⚠️. Day 4+ flagged 🔴 Dead Zone.
Hard data to defend or reject changes to the 72-hour auto-abandon rule.
First Cash Paid month → % who bought 2nd and 3rd item. 6-month LTV per cohort.
Product, State, Assigned, Delivered (Cash Paid), Success %, Primary Failure Reason (most common failure_reason_id for this product-state combination).
Switch grouping variable: State, Agent, LGA, or CSR.
Every screen inherits from these rules. Claude Code must not deviate without explicit instruction.
#EF4444 — banned rows, error toasts, On Break amber bar
#F59E0B — bottom sidebar bar when On Break active
Inter or system sans-serif. No decorative fonts.
WhatsApp on desktop. Call on mobile.
Chain link icon beside it opens strategy file in new tab.
Intercepted by modal — forces date_paid and logistics_fee.
Intercepted by modal — forces failure_reason_id and mandatory comment.
Instant. No confirmation dialog. Session invalidated immediately.
Blocked by system. Enters Pending Director Approval state.
Hidden by default. Only appears when ban or zero-fee rule triggered.
Jamisan ERP Spec — Day 3 Complete | Build Blitz: 9 Modules Starting Module 1
